name: Bacon and Cheese Scones
servings: serves 12 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 20 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 400°F (204°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flours, baking powder, salt, pepper, and sugar.
Stir in the butter, cheddar cheese, bacon, chives, buttermilk and egg.
Using your hands, knead a dough from the mixture.
Roll the dough out into a rectangular shape ½ -inch thick. Cut the dough into 12 triangles.
Arrange the triangles on the prepared baking sheet. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden-brown.
